Tesla sold 36,642 vehicles in the United States in June, a 19.7% decline from the 45,628 units sold in the same month a year earlier, estimates released on Thursday by Motor Intelligence showed."},{"url":"https://www.hotcars.com/tesla-cybertruck-stop-sale-drone-footage-shows-dozens-backed-up-at-texas-gigafactory/","title":"Tesla Cybertruck Stop Sale: Drone Footage Shows Dozens Backed Up At Texas Gigafactory","content":"Amid reports of both a stop sale related to a safety issue and widespread layoffs, stockpiles of the media sensation 2024 Tesla Cybertruck appear to be accumulating outside the Tesla Gigafactory Texas near Austin.

tavily.raw: {"query":"Tesla Cybercab stored outside Gigafactory Texas hundreds units EPA Certificate of Conformity street legal April 2026 drone footage","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.teslarati.com/tesla-gives-biggest-signal-yet-that-cybercab-launch-imminent","title":"Tesla Cybercab launch is imminent after latest sighting at ...","content":"The Cybercab has been spotted outside of Gigafactory Texas in massive numbers over the past few days, with hundreds of units being stored on","score":0.77179235,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/teslainvestorsclub/comments/1su3j2c/tesla_to_mass_produce_cybercab_with_workaround","title":"Tesla to Mass Produce Cybercab with workaround for 2500 ...","content":"Recent drone footage of Gigafactory Texas captured Cybercab units already bearing official federal compliance stickers, suggesting the vehicle","score":0.64986813,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.greendrive-accessories.com/blog/language/en/tesla-cybercab-production-avril-2026","title":"Tesla Cybercab production 2026 : Guide Essentiel","content":"# Tesla Cybercab: production starts in April 2026 — everything you need to know about the autonomous robotaxi. The **Tesla Cybercab,** **set for** **production in April 2026**, marks a historic turning point for the automotive industry. This fully autonomous robotaxi, with no steering wheel or pedals, has officially gone into production at the **Gigafactory Texas** in Austin, signalling Tesla’s entry into the era of large-scale autonomous mobility. ## Tesla Cybercab production April 2026: the official timeline. According to several sources and confirmations from Elon Musk, **Tesla Cybercab production** began in February 2026 with the first unit rolling off the production line, followed by a gradual ramp-up expected to reach several hundred units per week from **April 2026**. The Cybercab is based on an entirely new platform, sharing no components with the current Model 3 or Model Y. With **production** of the **Tesla Cybercab** set to begin, GreenDrive is preparing to offer accessories dedicated to this revolutionary new vehicle.","score":0.61363083,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://eletric-vehicles.com/tesla/tesla-cybercab-production-shifts-to-steering-wheel-free-builds-drone-footage-shows","title":"Tesla Cybercab Production Shifts to Steering-Wheel-Free Builds, Drone Footage Shows","content":"Home | Tesla Cybercab Production Shifts to Steering-Wheel-Free Builds, Drone Footage Shows. # Tesla Cybercab Production Shifts to Steering-Wheel-Free Builds, Drone Footage Shows. New drone images show Tesla has begun ramping up production of the Cybercab model with no steering wheel at its Giga Texas facility — marking a significant milestone for the purpose-built autonomous model. The question of whether the Cybercab would include a steering wheel has been a recurring topic since the model was unveiled at the ‘We, Robot’ event in October 2024 as a fully autonomous two-seater with no pedals or steering wheel. A few months later, when the Cybercab was first spotted testing on California roads, Tesla Chair Robyn Denholm told *Bloomberg* that “if we have to have a steering wheel, it can have a steering wheel and pedals” — a comment that diverged from CEO Elon Musk’s position that the model was “a vehicle that’s optimized for full autonomy.”.","score":0.56690645,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://electrek.co/2026/04/23/tesla-cybercab-production-starts-no-nhtsa-2500-vehicle-cap","title":"Tesla confirms Cybercab production has started despite delays in unsupervised driving | Electrek","content":"# Tesla confirms Cybercab production has started despite delays in unsupervised driving. CEO Elon Musk confirmed during Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings call that Cybercab production has officially begun at Giga Texas. VP of Vehicle Engineering Lars Moravy confirmed that the Cybercab will not be subject to NHTSA’s 2,500-vehicle annual production cap for autonomous vehicles. The 2,500-vehicle limit comes from NHTSA’s exemption process for vehicles that don’t meet all Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards (FMVSS). When asked on X whether the 2,500 cap applies to the Cybercab, Moravy’s answer was a single word: “No.”. The key is that Tesla designed the Cybercab to comply with all existing FMVSS standards on its own — no waiver needed. But if Tesla’s self-certification holds up, that entire legislative fight is irrelevant to the Cybercab — Tesla can scale production unconstrained by exemption limits. On today’s Q1 2026 earnings call, Musk confirmed that Cybercab production is underway: “We have just started production of Cybercab,” he said, though he immediately tempered expectations.","score":0.5060794,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.92,"request_id":"a21ed005-bc46-453e-837e-1185e1f68be4"}
